data.body: AC amendment: Task must also add .test-index entries for both new scripts: (1) 'plugins/dso/scripts/recipe-executor.sh: tests/scripts/test-recipe-executor.sh' and (2) 'plugins/dso/scripts/recipe-adapters/rope-adapter.sh: tests/scripts/test-rope-adapter.sh'. These entries ensure the pre-commit test gate triggers the correct tests when these files are staged. Without them, commits modifying the scripts will have a silent test coverage gap. Add these entries to .test-index at repo root.
